## What changed

Describe the user-visible outcome and the smallest coherent reason for this change.

## Evidence

Include tests, sanitized fixture behavior, and before/after output when relevant. Explain confidence or false-positive impact for diagnosis changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused and removed dead or commented-out code.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for changed behavior.
- [ ] I ran `bun run check`, `bun run test`, `bun run build`, and `bun run verify:portable` where supported.
- [ ] I updated schemas and documentation when behavior or formats changed.
- [ ] I reviewed fixtures, logs, screenshots, and exports for private data.
- [ ] I did not add telemetry, network diagnosis, AI, API keys, or cloud dependencies.
- [ ] I agree to license this contribution under Apache-2.0.
